subcodes.first_line: O Attar, scatter the musk of mysteries across the horizons, that the hearts of the deniers may be quickened and awakened, and the lights [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای عطار مشک اسرار بر اقطار نثار کن تا قلوب اهل انکار زنده و بیدار گردد و انوار
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @call to action, @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life
